calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd. (Real Property)
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell.
David Wall, Esq. for Plaintiff: Debt Enforcement, Inc.,
Plaintiff's Witness: David Wall was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Albert Yuen, Siew Lan Chen Yuen, Thomas K. Yuen and Kam Sui Ng Yuen.
Judgment signed in open court, see scanned doc. for details.
